title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are seeking an experienced Senior Frontend Engineer to lead the development of our web applications. As a senior engineer, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining large-scale frontend applications.

Responsibilities:
- Lead the development of frontend applications using Angular and related technologies
- Collaborate with designers to implement visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces
- Work with backend engineers to integrate frontend and backend services
- Optimize application performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility
- Mentor junior engineers and provide technical guidance
- Participate in code reviews and ensure high-quality code

Must-have skills:
- Strong proficiency in Angular and JavaScript
- Experience with Bootstrap and Sass
- Knowledge of Flexbox and CSS grid systems
- Familiarity with Gulp and build tools
- Understanding of Karma and testing frameworks
- Experience with Lighthouse and Chrome DevTools

Nice to have:
- Experience with Webpack and module bundlers
- Knowledge of GraphQL and API design principles
- Familiarity with Docker and containerization
